jsonLd.title: Sharekhan is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!
